2023-24 Saint Mary's Gaels Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 26-8 (15-1, 1st in WCC MBB)

Rank: 21st in the Final AP Poll

Coach: Randy Bennett

PS/G: 74.0 (163rd of 362)

PA/G: 59.2 (2nd of 362)

SRS: 16.31 (21st of 362)

SOS: 3.46 (99th of 362)

ORtg: 115.2 (22nd of 362)

DRtg: 92.2 (4th of 362)

Preseason Odds: Championship +6600

NCAA Tournament: (#5 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (75-66) versus #12 Grand Canyon

  • WCC Reg Season Champ
  • WCC Tourney Champ
